sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n67659" key="miaro/glwssos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μῐᾰρόγλωσσος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n67659.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">foul-mouthed,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.377</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Eryc.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
